title: Wynncraft QoL
description: A curated Wynncraft QoL modpack designed to improve gameplay with the best quality-of-life mods and utilities.
body:
# **Description:**
A lightweight Wynncraft QoL modpack focused on improving gameplay with performance enhancements and quality-of-life features.

It enhances Wynncraft’s quest system with improved UI and tracking tools for smoother progression.

Actively maintained to ensure updates and compatibility.

# **Features**
- **Wynntils:** Minimap, world map, and improved content book
- **wynnmod:** Advanced raid info, ability tree support, UI improvements, lootrun tools, professions, and more
- **WynnExtras:** Bank Overlay, Custom class selection screen, Crafting Helper, Weekly Lootpools, Skillpoint helper, and more
- **Class Keybind Profiles:** Easily switch spell keybinds between classes
- **Mouse Tweaks:** Faster inventory management with click-and-drag
- **Server Pack Unlocker:** Allows custom resource packs alongside the Wynncraft pack

# **Included Mods**
1. [Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker)
1. [Class Keybind Profiles](https://modrinth.com/mod/class-keybind-profiles)
1. [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
1. [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
1. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
1. [wynnmod](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynnmod)
1. [Wynntils](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynntils)
1. [WynnExtras](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynnextras)
1. [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
1. [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
1. [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
